vocab.meaning: cao ngất ngưởng, áp đảo những thứ xung quanh
vocab.example: I love capturing the way modern glass skyscrapers tower over the small, traditional houses in my neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: làm nổi bật cái gì đó lên
vocab.example: The dark, overcast sky really sets off the white marble of the cathedral, making for a dramatic shot.

vocab.meaning: làm lộ ra, làm nổi bật (một đặc điểm nào đó)
vocab.example: Using a high-contrast filter helps to bring out the gritty details of the weathered brickwork.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng quy mô, phóng to (không gian chụp)
vocab.example: I often scale up my perspective by using a wide-angle lens to encompass the entire facade of a palace.

vocab.meaning: che khuất (ánh sáng hoặc tầm nhìn)
vocab.example: I find it challenging when ugly scaffolding blocks out the beautiful arches I’m trying to document.
While wandering through the old quarter, I managed to stumble on a hidden courtyard with breathtaking colonial architecture.
The city council decided to light up the ancient bridge at night, which creates a stunning reflection for long-exposure photos.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn (một phong cách hoặc đối tượng)
vocab.example: Rather than focusing on the whole building, I usually go for abstract shots of symmetrical windows.

vocab.meaning: lo lắng, băn khoăn (về một chi tiết kỹ thuật)
vocab.example: I tend to fret over the lighting for ages before I finally press the shutter button to capture a monument.
Every time I point my camera at that brutalist library, I’m amazed by its raw, industrial beauty.
